description: Implement a non-writing Pyex workflow that plans bounded Exa queries, dedupes candidates, ranks them against the company profile, and selects enrichment targets. Inject only frozen inputs and narrow read capabilities; enforce hard BEAM process limits. Acceptance: compare determinism, precision, latency, and maintainability against the existing Elixir baseline using the evaluation corpus.
title: Pilot Pyex for acquisition query planning and ranking
